[[File:Soulflame horn detail.png|130px|left]]
The '''soulflame horn''' is a weapon obtained as a rare drop from [[Yama]] that requires level 80 [[Magic]] to equip. It is a guaranteed drop when defeating him in a [[contract of harmony acquisition]] fight. The horn's main appeal is its special attack, which empowers nearby players' next melee attack, allowing its user to fill a support role in group content.

==Special attack==
[[File:Entice.gif|thumb|left|200px|A player performing the soulflame horn's special attack, ''Entice'', with another player receiving its effect.]]
The soulflame horn has a [[special attack]], ''Entice'', which is applied to up to 3 other players within a 3 tile radius of the user, costing 25% special attack energy per other player affected. The soulflame horn is only usable when in range of at least one other player but will also apply the ''Entice'' effect to the user, regardless of the number of affected players and without impacting the cost. The player may configure (while equipped) the radius (0-3) and maximum number of allies affected by right clicking the horn.

When under the effects of ''Entice'', the player's next melee attack within 10 ticks (6 seconds) is always a [[successful hit]]; this also applies to melee special attacks. For multi-hitting attacks (such as the [[dual macuahuitl]], [[Scythe of Vitur]], or [[dragon dagger]] special attack), this effect only applies to the ''first'' [[hitsplat]]. However, due to the intricacies surrounding the special attacks of the [[dragon claws]] and [[burning claws]], those will have their ''second'' accuracy check affected instead, and follow the corresponding damage patterns.

If attacking another player, the effect is replaced by a 100% accuracy increase for their next melee attack.

The special is primarily used with defence-draining specials such as the [[elder maul]], as this helps conserve special attack energy for more damaging attacks after the target's Defence has been reduced as much as possible.

[[Ironmen]] can only receive the effects of ''Entice'' from other players in certain group content ([[Nightmare]], [[Nex]], all [[Raids]], [[Royal Titans]], and [[Yama]]). [[Group ironmen]] can receive its effects outside of the aforementioned content if another member of the group uses it.

Another nearby player must have [[Accept Aid]] turned on for the special to take effect. If they do not you will receive a message that says "{{mes|colour=red|You blow your horn into the wind. No-one nearby is able to listen.}}", and the flame effect around the mouth of the horn will not appear. Additionally, no special attack energy will be used, but the standard attack cooldown will apply.
